volume_plans.title: Eight Bars, Unfinished
volume_plans.logline: Premiere in three weeks; the stuck eight bars pass in margins; Mio claims the window seat unhidden for the first time.

recurrence.renewable_unit: The shared song passing hand to hand — his ink bars vs her pencil bars in the manuscript margins — under a premiere clock.

volume_plans.title: The Premiere Room
volume_plans.logline: Co-credit negotiations and a rival arranger who plays Ren's phrase perfectly but without the margin history — borrowed brilliance vs earned duet.

recurrence.renewable_unit: The shared song passing hand to hand — his ink bars vs her pencil bars in the manuscript margins — under a premiere clock.

volume_plans.title: The Review That Names No One
volume_plans.logline: Press cycle tries to name only the famous pianist; the anonymous pencil bars threaten to vanish from the record.

recurrence.renewable_unit: The shared song passing hand to hand — his ink bars vs her pencil bars in the manuscript margins — under a premiere clock.

volume_plans.title: The Other Window
volume_plans.logline: A second shop, a second seat — can the song exist when the geography of permission changes?

recurrence.renewable_unit: The shared song passing hand to hand — his ink bars vs her pencil bars in the manuscript margins — under a premiere clock.

volume_plans.title: Both Halves, Aloud
volume_plans.logline: Final premiere; both names on the program; the hook renews — another stuck phrase, another Thursday.

recurrence.renewable_unit: The shared song passing hand to hand — his ink bars vs her pencil bars in the manuscript margins — under a premiere clock.
